title: 亮点检测
description: 1/4 点亮图亮点检测参数。默认值来自 CvOledInterface.h 中的 findPixelDefectsForQuardImgMemWithConfigImp 示例。

th.title: 亮度阈值
th.$comment: Provider/AI note: keep JSON path '$.th' compatible with the C++ JSON interface; enrich title/description/unit/range/enum/x-ui if known.

x-provider.aiHint: Add user-facing description, unit, valid range, enum meaning, and UI grouping/order if known. Keep the JSON key and runtime default compatible.

index.title: 1/4 图位置
index.$comment: Provider/AI note: keep JSON path '$.index' compatible with the C++ JSON interface; enrich title/description/unit/range/enum/x-ui if known.

x-provider.aiHint: Add user-facing description, unit, valid range, enum meaning, and UI grouping/order if known. Keep the JSON key and runtime default compatible.

num_th.title: 异常灯珠数量阈值
num_th.$comment: Provider/AI note: keep JSON path '$.num_th' compatible with the C++ JSON interface; enrich title/description/unit/range/enum/x-ui if known.

x-provider.aiHint: Add user-facing description, unit, valid range, enum meaning, and UI grouping/order if known. Keep the JSON key and runtime default compatible.

num_th.description: 缺陷 LED / 异常灯珠数量阈值，超过后判定为 NG。

notes: Defaults are sourced from provider-maintained AOI test-case config files because the database cfg_json may lag behind provider development.
additionalProperties remains true so provider DLL updates can add fields without being blocked by this schema.
This schema is intended for UI display, validation hints, and provider-maintained documentation only.

providerSchema.purpose: Provider-maintained UI and validation metadata for a JSON string interface.
aiInstructions: Keep JSON property keys compatible with the C++ DLL; C++ receives the JSON string by key.
Default/type may follow provider-maintained config files when database cfg_json is stale.
Do not set additionalProperties to false; provider DLLs may add fields in later versions.
Prefer enriching title, description, unit, minimum, maximum, enum, examples, and x-ui metadata.
Use description for user-facing explanations. Use $comment or x-provider for maintainer-only notes.
